title: Attachment 1: Preparation of Fluorescein Diacetate and Propidium Iodide Stock Solutions  (FDA/PI)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"76b0l","text":"This Standard Operating Procedure is adapted from the work of the 'National Institutes of Health-Sponsored Clinical Islet Transplantation Consortium Phase 3 Trial: Manufacture of a Complex Cellular Product at Eight Processing Facilities'' following the SOP cited in the document 'Purified Human Pancreatic Islet - Viability Estimation of Islet Using Fluorescent Dyes (FDA/PI): Standard Operating Procedure of the NIH Clinical Islet Transplantation Consortium'","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":67,"length":172},{"style":"italic","offset":279,"length":180}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9gcr4","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bod1k","text":"This SOP defines the procedure for assessment of viability of human isolated islet preparations, which include endocrine and exocrine tissue, for use in the National Institute of Diabetes and Digestive and Kidney Diseases (NIDDK) sponsored research in the Integrated Islet Distribution Program (IIDP).  This protocol is written to assist the participating islet isolation centers and investigators who are part of this program.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4p4p4","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"e3i44","text":"Fluorescein Diacetate/ Propidium Iodide (FDA)/(PI) Viability Assay is a rapid fluorometric method to test the integrity of the plasma membrane simultaneously using inclusion and exclusion dyes; the assay differentiates between viable and nonviable cells and is, consequently, used for determination of viability of islet preparations.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5kr0d","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bhmc2","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"cskmj","text":"Fluorescein Diacetate/ Propidium Iodide (FDA)/(PI) Viability Assay is a rapid fluorometric method to test the integrity of the plasma membrane simultaneously using inclusion and exclusion dyes; the assay differentiates between viable and nonviable cells and is, consequently, used for determination of viability of islet preparations.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":66}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"a2hhg","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"eb98g","text":"The inclusion dye is Fluorescein Diacetate (FDA) and the exclusion dye is Propidium Iodide (PI). The final concentrations are as follows:","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"153sf","text":"              ♦ FDA: 0.46 µM","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1r482","text":"              ♦ PI: 14.34 µM ","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2f5ng","text":"   ","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fmcoi","text":"Fluorescein Diacetate is a nonpolar ester, which passes through plasma membranes and is hydrolyzed by intracellular esterases to produce free fluorescein. The polar fluorescein is confined within cells with an intact plasma membrane and can be observed under appropriate excitation conditions. FDA functions as an inclusion dye, i.e., viable cells will appear bright green fluorescent using FDA.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"86jj5","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"a9i1g","text":"Propidium iodide functions as an exclusion dye that cannot penetrate living cells but readily enters dead or dying cells. Once PI penetrates through the cell membrane, it binds to nucleic acids and causes them to fluoresce bright orange/red. PI absorbs in green light and fluoresces orange/red.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7u1gg","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"72o5p","text":"Both of the fluorescent dyes used in this assay are light sensitive and must be kept in the dark, covered with aluminum foil.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"71jp5","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fb6gq","text":" The fluorescent dyes are temperature sensitive and must be stored as follows:","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"eslht","text":"                ♦ FDA: ≤ -20°C","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"97uu","text":"                ♦ PI: 2-8° C","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"7io6s","text":"Always wear gloves and observe standard chemical procedures:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":60}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"finja","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"d0ghs","text":"Fluorescein Diacetate:  ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":23}],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":22,"length":1}],"data":[]},{"key":"ct4ql","text":" Protect from light. Avoid contact and inhalation.  Nitrile gloves are recommended in the MSDS when handling FDA.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"a303d","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3avgq","text":"Propidium Iodide:  ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":18}],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":17,"length":1}],"data":[]},{"key":"a8j8e","text":" Use personal protective equipment. Product may be toxic if inhaled, swallowed, or splashed on skin.  Avoid dust formation.  Avoid breathing vapors, mist, or gas. Ensure adequate ventilation.  Wear gloves and observe Safety Data Sheet. Suspected of causing genetic defects.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dmra2","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"p4l2","text":"Acetone:   ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[{"key":2,"offset":9,"length":1}],"data":[]},{"key":"7nutj","text":" Solvent/Flammable. Keep away from heat, spark, and open flame. Keep container tightly closed. Use with adequate ventilation. Avoid contact with eyes. Avoid prolonged or repeated breathing of vapor. Handle with gloves. Gloves must be inspected prior to use. Use proper glove removal technique (without touching glove's outer surface) to avoid skin contact with this product. Dispose of contaminated gloves after use in accordance with applicable laws and good laboratory practices. Wash and dry hands.  Store aliquots in tightly sealed in glass or polypropylene tubes with polypropylene or polyethylene closure.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5i6ng","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cesms","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"file","mutability":"","data":{"forceSelection":true,"guid":"04335CF8342A11EEAFD10A58A9FEAC02","nestedSelector":null,"original_name":"FDA MSDSAction.pdf","placeholder":"/img/extensions/pdf.png","source":"https://content.protocols.io/public/c4c9c66a2cc907527eb2b05be564fe5fbaf98c54cbfe00d44b1e683b19bcd05b/bvya7rfn.pdf"}},"1":{"type":"file","mutability":"","data":{"forceSelection":true,"guid":"04335DA8342A11EEAFD10A58A9FEAC02","nestedSelector":null,"original_name":"PI MSDSAction.pdf","placeholder":"/img/extensions/pdf.png","source":"https://content.protocols.io/public/c4c9c66a2cc907527eb2b05be564fe5fbaf98c54cbfe00d44b1e683b19bcd05b/bvyb7rfn.pdf"}},"2":{"type":"file","mutability":"","data":{"forceSelection":true,"guid":"04335E46342A11EEAFD10A58A9FEAC02","nestedSelector":null,"original_name":"AcetoneMSDSAction.pdf","placeholder":"/img/extensions/pdf.png","source":"https://content.protocols.io/public/c4c9c66a2cc907527eb2b05be564fe5fbaf98c54cbfe00d44b1e683b19bcd05b/bvyc7rfn.pdf"}}}}

steps: Prepare 24 micromolar (µM) Fluorescein Diacetate (FDA) according to the formulation in sub-steps below. The expiration date, for both PI and FDA stains, is six months from the date of preparation. Both of the fluorescent dyes used in this assay are light sensitive and must be kept in the dark, covered with aluminum foil.
Prepare 750 micromolar (µM) Propidium Iodide (PI) according to the formulation in sub-steps below.

Calculation: FDA FW = 416.4 Stock Concentration = 24 µM Volume required = 200 mL Formula: FW X Concentration X Volume = (416.4) x (24 x 10 -6 ) X (200 x 10 -3 ) = 0.00199 g FDA Sigma Aldrich has a Mass Molarity Calculator that can be used to determine smaller quantities: https://www.sigmaaldrich.com/chemistry/stockroom-reagents/learning-center/technical-library/mass-molarity-calculator.html

Store Stock FDA solution tightly sealed in 4 mL or smaller aliquots in polypropylene tubes or glass tubes at ≤ -20 °C , protected from light , for up to six months. Record the following on each aliquot tube: FDA (24 µM) Stock Solution Assigned Lot number:___________________________ Expiration Date: ____________________________________________________________ Prepared By/Date: _________________________________________________________ Reviewed By/Date: _________________________________________________________
Calculation: PI FW = 668.4 Stock Concentration = 750 µM Volume required = 25 mL FW X Concentration X Volume = (668.4) x (750 x 10 -6 ) X (25 x 10 -3 ) = 0.0125 g PI

Store Stock PI solution tightly sealed in 0.5 mL or smaller aliquots in polypropylene Microcentrifuge Snap Cap tubes or glass tubes at 2 °C to 8 °C , protected from light , for up to six months. Record the following on each aliquot tube: PI (750 µM) Stock Solution Assigned Lot number:___________________________ Expiration Date: ____________________________________________________________ Prepared By/Date: _________________________________________________________ Reviewed By/Date: _________________________________________________________
creator: Integrated Islet Distribution Program
